Fact: Kingler shares its category name with Scizor. They are both known as the Pincer Pokémon, though Scizor was originally called the Scissors Pokémon.
Kingler's number in the National Pokédex and the Galar Pokédex in Sword and Shield are the same: 099.

Many of Kingler's Pokédex entries mention its claws having the crushing power of 10,000 horsepower. In actuality, horsepower is a unit of power which is energy divided by time—not related to pressure in any way. More fitting units would be pounds per square inch (U.S. customary) and pascals (SI).

For unknown reasons, Kingler's front sprite in Japanese Pokémon Blue appears to depict its two pincers at the same size. This is also carried to localizations of Pokémon Red and Blue. In Pokémon Yellow, Kingler's sprite uses the same design with one oversized pincer as Pokémon Red and Green, which would then be carried to all future games.
